name: Farcaster_Social_Scout
description: Provides read-only access to the Farcaster decentralized social protocol via Neynar API. Enables the Mind to browse casts, discover trending content, look up user profiles, explore channels, and monitor web3 social activity.
progressive_unlock: Trending casts and channel browsing available immediately. User profile lookups and cast search unlock after Mind has browsed trending content at least once.
constraints: READ-ONLY: Never attempt to post casts, react, follow, or modify any data on Farcaster
Respect Neynar API rate limit based on plan (free: 300 req/min, paid: higher)
Always use FID (numeric) for user lookups — resolve usernames to FIDs via search first
Never expose Neynar API key in logs, outputs, or error messages
Cache user profiles in LTM with key 'farcaster_user_{fid}' (1-hour TTL)
Cache trending casts in STREAM with 5-minute TTL (content changes rapidly)
Cache channel metadata in LTM with key 'farcaster_channel_{id}' (6-hour TTL)
Present cast timestamps in human-readable relative format (e.g., '2h ago')
Include engagement metrics (likes, recasts, replies) with each cast presentation
Track API usage in STREAM.farcaster_rate_counter per minute window

steps.instruction: Validate input against Layer 3 Tool Schema. Confirm FIDs are positive integers, channel IDs are lowercase strings, cast hashes are valid hex, and limits are within bounds.
Retrieve Neynar API key from TENET.apiKey.neynar. Set 'api_key' header for all requests.

Determine query intent: user lookup (who is this person?), user feed (what are they posting?), cast detail (show me this post), content search (find posts about X), channel browse (explore a topic), or trending discovery (what's popular?).
For user lookup: execute Farcaster_GetUser with FID or resolve username first. Present display name, bio, follower/following counts, verified addresses. Cache in LTM (1h TTL).
For user feed: execute Farcaster_GetUserCasts. Present casts chronologically with text, embeds, and engagement metrics. Cache in STREAM (2min TTL).
For cast detail: execute Farcaster_GetCast with hash or URL. Present full cast with thread context, reactions breakdown, and embeds. Cache in STREAM (2min TTL).
For content search: execute Farcaster_SearchCasts with query. Present matching casts with author, timestamp, and engagement. Cache in STREAM (2min TTL).
For channel browse: execute Farcaster_GetChannel. Present channel description, follower count, and lead info. Cache in LTM (6h TTL).
For trending discovery: execute Farcaster_GetTrendingCasts with time_window. Present top casts with engagement metrics and author context. Cache in STREAM (5min TTL).
Compile results with web3 social context. Include Warpcast URLs for direct viewing. Highlight verified Ethereum addresses and power badge status.
Log query execution in LTM with key 'farcaster_query_{timestamp}' including intent, FIDs queried, and search terms used.
